title: palicourea stevensiana
intro: Palicourea stevensiana, also known as the Stevens' palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
